accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and verified context: CRA disapproval, DOE rule, Federal Register date, and legislative dates are correct.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the chapter 8 of title 5 reference and DOE administration are accurate context consistent with the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the purpose is congressional disapproval and nullification of the DOE rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly identifies the CRA authority (chapter 8 of title 5) and that the resolution nullifies the specified DOE rule.

exceptions_conditions.why: This single-provision disapproval resolution contains no material exceptions or conditions.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes approval on May 9, 2025, House passage March 5, and Senate passage April 29-30, 2025.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the sole operative effect: disapproval rendering the rule of no force or effect.

objective_tone.why: The summary is neutral and factual with no editorializing.

concise.why: Some mild repetition of the rule title but overall succinct and free of boilerplate.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names the Department of Energy, Congress, the President, and the rule title.

correct_figures.why: Dates (Oct 9, 2024; Mar 5, Apr 29-30, May 9, 2025) and Public Law 119-8 are all correct.
